prompts.text: "Germinate" — when a seed starts to grow, we say it germinates. The tiny root pushes down and the shoot pushes up.
Ask: "What do you think a plant needs to grow?" — before they start, let them predict.
Narrate each stage as it happens: "First the seed, then the shoot appears, now the flower is blooming!"
At each new stage, ask: "What do you think comes next?" — builds prediction and sequencing.
